blocks.body: Third Conditional pomaga mówić o nierealnej przeszłości według modelu if + past perfect, would have + V3.

{"level":"B2","intro":"Third Conditional opisuje nierealną sytuację w przeszłości: wyobrażamy sobie, że wydarzenia potoczyły się inaczej, i mówimy o innym skutku w przeszłości.","rules":[{"label":"WARUNEK W PRZESZŁOŚCI","color":"emerald","text":"If-clause zwykle używa formy Past Perfect.","example":"If we had left earlier, we would have caught the train."},{"label":"SKUTEK W PRZESZŁOŚCI","color":"blue","text":"W głównej części najczęściej pojawia się would have + V3.","example":"If she had studied more, she would have passed."},{"label":"ŻAL I ANALIZA","color":"amber","text":"Ta forma często wyraża żal, krytykę albo analizę po fakcie.","example":"If I had listened, I wouldn't have made that mistake."}]}

{"title":"1. Forma","intro":"Podstawowy wzór to if + past perfect, would have + V3.","items":[{"label":"Główny wzór","title":"if + had + V3, would have + V3","subtitle":"If he had called, I would have answered."},{"label":"Najpierw rezultat","title":"would have + V3 + if + clause","subtitle":"I would have helped if I had known."},{"label":"Forma przecząca","title":"if hadn't + V3","subtitle":"If they hadn't missed the bus, they would have been on time."},{"label":"Inne modale","title":"could have / might have","subtitle":"If you had asked, I might have joined."}]}

{"title":"2. Główne zastosowania","sections":[{"label":"Żal o przeszłość","color":"emerald","description":"Żałujemy, że coś nie potoczyło się inaczej w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"If I had left home earlier, I would have caught the plane.","ua":"Gdybym wyszedł z domu wcześniej, zdążyłbym na samolot."},{"en":"If she had taken the map, she wouldn't have got lost.","ua":"Gdyby wzięła mapę, nie zgubiłaby się."}]},{"label":"Wyobrażony inny skutek","color":"blue","description":"Porównujemy prawdziwy bieg wydarzeń z innym wyobrażonym skutkiem w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"If we had booked sooner, we would have paid less.","ua":"Gdybyśmy zarezerwowali wcześniej, zapłacilibyśmy mniej."},{"en":"If they had listened to the warning, they would have avoided the problem.","ua":"Gdyby posłuchali ostrzeżenia, uniknęliby problemu."}]},{"label":"Krytyка lub analiza po fakcie","color":"amber","description":"Ta konstrukcja często pojawia się wtedy, gdy analizujemy błąd albo skutek już po wydarzeniu.","examples":[{"en":"If you had checked the file, you would have seen the typo.","ua":"Gdybyś sprawdził plik, zobaczyłbyś literówkę."},{"en":"If I had known about the delay, I would have stayed at home longer.","ua":"Gdybym wiedział o opóźnieniu, zostałbym dłużej w domu."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Wstawianie would have do if-clause.","wrong":"If I would have known, I would have called.","right":"If I had known, I would have called.","hint":"W Third Conditional if-clause zwykle ma formę past perfect."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie past simple zamiast past perfect.","wrong":"If she studied more, she would have passed.","right":"If she had studied more, she would have passed.","hint":"Dla nierealnego warunku w przeszłości potrzebujesz had + V3."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Mylenie Third Conditional z żalem o teraźniejszość.","wrong":"If I had more money yesterday, I would be happier now.","right":"If I had had more money yesterday, I would have been happier then.","hint":"Third Conditional skupia się na przeszłej przyczynie i przeszłym skutku. Jeśli skutek jest teraźniejszy, prawdopodobnie potrzebujesz mixed conditional."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótka reguła","items":["Używaj if + past perfect, would have + V3 do nierealnej sytuacji w przeszłości.","Ta forma często wyraża żal, analizę po czasie albo alternatywny skutek.","W if-clause zwykle nie stawiamy would have.","Jeśli przeszła przyczyna prowadzi do teraźniejszego skutku, prawdopodobnie potrzebujesz mixed conditional."]}

{"title":"Strony w tym dziale","items":[{"label":"Zero Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/zero-conditional","current":false},{"label":"First Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/first-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Second Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/second-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Third Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/third-conditional","current":true},{"label":"Mixed Conditionals","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/mixed-conditionals","current":false},{"label":"Unless / Provided / As long as","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/unless-provided-as-long-as","current":false},{"label":"In case","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/in-case","current":false},{"label":"Wish / If only","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/wish-if-only","current":false},{"label":"Would rather","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/would-rather","current":false},{"label":"Had better","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/had-better","current":false}]}
